widgets_values: extract the outfit onto a white background
Describe this image in detail. Focus on subject, pose, background, situation and mood of the image.

The image depicts a stylish outfit consisting of a black blazer and floral-patterned pants. The blazer features a prominent embroidered floral design on the left side, with pink, white, and blue flowers. The pants have a large pink rose and various other colorful flowers and leaves printed on a light grey background. The blazer is paired with a white shirt underneath, adding a formal touch to the ensemble. The overall style is sophisticated and fashion-forward, with a focus on bold floral patterns and a chic monochromatic base. The mood of the image is elegant and stylish, suggesting a sense of confidence and fashion-conscious elegance.
